branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Rockpile & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Rockies pride

columnists.name: Casey Underwood
columnists.backstory: A LoDo reporter who covered Rocktober and still keeps a box of dirt from Coors Field in his desk drawer as a lucky charm.
columnists.voice_sample: Doyle tripled, Márquez pitched into the sixth, and the Rockies beat the Dodgers 6-4 at Coors Field. Record now 7-10.

columnists.name: Winnie Calderón
columnists.backstory: A Highlands neighborhood art-teacher who believes Coors Field is a spiritual experience and that the Rockies are due another miracle run.
columnists.voice_sample: Everyone counts us out in April. That's when Rocktober is being assembled. You watch. You watch what happens when the rotation clicks.

columnists.name: Dwight Krenek
columnists.backstory: An Arvada retired accountant who knows Monfort's ownership history by heart and recites it at Denny's on weekends.
columnists.voice_sample: Rebuilds take plans. Plans take people who think about baseball. The Monforts think about suite revenue and farm equipment. Same column every year, friend.
